dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: In a world where superpowers are commonplace, the social hierarchy is absolute.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: From the strongest 'high-tiers' to the weakest 'low-tiers', everyone knows their place.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: And then, there are the 'cripples'. Those born without abilities.

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: Another beautiful morning at Wellston High. Or, as I like to call it, 'The Daily Gauntlet'.

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: Just gotta make it through the day without getting my face rearranged. Simple enough for a cripple, right?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Watch where you're going, cripple!

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: (Rubbing his shoulder) My apologies. My eyes must have missed your overwhelming aura.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: What was that, punk?

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: Just admiring your impressive physique. Clearly, you've been working out. Or... just born lucky.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: He's making fun of you, dude!

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Oh, I know. And I don't appreciate it.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACKLE (electricity)

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: Whoa, easy there, sparky. Just a compliment. No need to get all... charged up.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: You think this is a joke?

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: Not at all. Just trying to lighten the mood before someone gets hurt. And let's be honest, it'd probably be me.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Smart mouth. You're lucky I'm in a good mood today. Get lost.

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: (Walking away) Phew. Close one. Another day, another successful de-escalation.

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: It's a delicate dance, really. Be just annoying enough to be memorable, but not so annoying they feel compelled to crush you.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: MURMURS (from other students)

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: There she is. The Queen of Wellston. Seraphina.

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: Level 8.0. The strongest student in the school. Probably the strongest in the entire district.

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: She walks through the halls like she owns them. Which, technically, she does. No one dares challenge her.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH (Seraphina passes by quickly)

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: Must be nice. To be so powerful, so untouchable. To not have to worry about every single interaction.

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: Me? I just need to get to lunch.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLATTER (lunch tray)

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: Hey! That was my last piece of cake!

dialogue.speaker: Bully 3
dialogue.line: Oops. My bad, cripple. Guess you'll have to go hungry.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 4
dialogue.line: He looks so pathetic, begging for food.

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: Pathetic? Nah. I'm just cultivating mass. And apparently, you're helping.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 3
dialogue.line: You want to fight, cripple?

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: And lose? Nah, I'm good. I'd rather keep my teeth.

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: Besides, I'm sure you could use the extra calories. You look like you're about to blow away in a strong breeze.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 3
dialogue.line: Why you little—!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GRRRR (Bully 3's aura flares)

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: Whoa, easy there. Just a friendly observation. You're looking... robust today. Very robust.

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: (Walking away, leaving the bullies confused) Man, being a cripple is exhausting. All this dodging and weaving, verbally and physically.

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: But it's better this way. It has to be.

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: No one needs to know the truth. No one needs to know what I really am.

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: The King of Wellston... That's a title I left behind a long, long time ago.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUSTLE (John's backpack)

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.line: Just a normal high school student. That's all I am now. That's all I want to be.

summary: John, a seemingly powerless 'cripple' at Wellston High, navigates his day by cleverly deflecting bullies and observing the power-based hierarchy, all while secretly harboring a powerful past.
